issues.title: locked-ether
issues.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract RentalNFT (contract.sol#5-96) has payable functions:
	 - RentalNFT.rentNFT(uint256,uint256) (contract.sol#49-59)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
issues.filename:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract RentalNFT (contract.sol
issues.recommendation: Add withdrawal function or make contract payable

issues.title: timestamp
issues.description:
RentalNFT.endRental(uint256) (contract.sol#63-71) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- renter[nftId] == address(0) || block.timestamp < rentalEndTime[nftId] (contract.sol#64)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: timestamp
issues.description:
RentalNFT.rentNFT(uint256,uint256) (contract.sol#49-59) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- renter[nftId] != address(0) && block.timestamp < rentalEndTime[nftId] (contract.sol#51)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#2)

stage2_metadata.security_summary:
Contract Type: Custom
Classification Confidence: 90%
Access Control: single_owner
Security Features: Standard
Implementation: Custom from scratch
Subtype: rental_nft

Reasoning: The contract involves renting NFTs, which is not covered by standard NFT templates like ERC721 or ERC1155. It requires custom logic to handle rental agreements, durations, and payments.
